title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Barharia
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Barharia assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Women voters of Barharia demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Barharia has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Barharia assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Barharia show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Barharia triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Barharia, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Barharia
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Barharia constituency.
